article.title: Rangers' £16m transfer boost, Old Firm away tickets latest & VAR ref summit
article.description: Rangers chairman Andrew Cavenagh has announced there will be a £16m cash injection to support summer transfers and other work around the club.

reactions.author: FootballFanatic_UK
reactions.text: Absolute robbery! This is why football is broken right now.

reactions.author: PremierLeagueFan
reactions.text: I've seen this happen 3 times this season. Something needs to change.

reactions.author: CoachMike_Tactics
reactions.text: Tactically this makes no sense. The setup was all wrong from the start.

reactions.author: SoccerStatsDaily
reactions.text: The numbers don't lie. This has been a pattern all season.
